name: google-cloud-skills-boost-skill
description: Reference summary of Google Cloud Skills Boost learning topics for cloud infrastructure, serverless, data, and AI architecture work.
---

# Google Cloud Skills Boost Reference

Use this skill when you need to:
- frame architecture decisions around Google Cloud core infrastructure
- recall high-level Google Cloud service areas for serverless, data, security, and AI work
- align new Firebase / GCP runtime design with common Google Cloud learning tracks
- translate Google Cloud training themes into implementation checklists or migration plans
- cross-reference the requested Google Skills Boost focus pages, course templates, and labs curated
  for this repository

## Included references

| File | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `references/summary.md` | High-level summary of the accessible Google Cloud Skills Boost content used to build this skill |
| `references/requested-resources.md` | Mapping of the specifically requested focus pages, course template, and labs, including what is publicly confirmed vs. only inferable from accessible sources |

## How to use

1. Start with `references/summary.md`
2. If the task mentions a specific Google Skills Boost URL or numeric resource ID, check `references/requested-resources.md`
3. Identify the relevant capability area:
   - core infrastructure
   - serverless/runtime
   - data platform
   - AI / ML
   - IAM / security
   - document AI / document processing labs
4. Apply the patterns as architecture guidance, not as product requirements

## Scope note

This skill is a concise internal reference derived from accessible public summaries of the requested
Google Cloud Skills Boost content. It is intended to guide design decisions, not to reproduce the
training material itself.
